def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  n = landStartTime.length
  m = waterStartTime.length

  # Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
  land_end_times = []
  water_end_times = []

  # Generate all possible end times for land attractions
  land_start_times = landStartTime
  land_durations = landDuration
  land_start_times.each_with_index do |start, i|
    land_end_times << start + land_durations[i]
  end

  # Generate all possible end times for water attractions
  water_start_times = waterStartTime
  water_durations = waterDuration
  water_start_times.each_with_index do |start, j|
    water_end_times << start + water_durations[j]
  end

  # Find the earliest possible end time by trying all combinations
  min_time = Float::INFINITY

  # Try all land attractions first, then water
  land_end_times.each do |land_end|
    # Find the earliest water start time that is >= land_end
    water_start = water_start_times.find { |s| s >= land_end } || 0
    water_end = water_start + water_durations.find { |d| d >= 0 } || 0
    min_time = [min_time, water_end].min
  end

  # Try all water attractions first, then land
  water_end_times.each do |water_end|
    # Find the earliest land start time that is >= water_end
    land_start = land_start_times.find { |s| s >= water_end } || 0
    land_end = land_start + land_durations.find { |d| d >= 0 } || 0
    min_time = [min_time, land_end].min
  end

  min_time
end
